CustomField.description: Updated by ScoreAssessment when a new Assessment__c record reaches Status = Completed for this Contact. Penny uses to flag stale data: if >30 days since last assessment, proactively suggest a check-in (only on explicit request or during Weekly Intelligence Report generation, per OD-4).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Updated by ScoreAssessment when a new Assessment__c record reaches Status = Completed for this Contact. Penny uses to flag stale data: if >30 days since last assessment, proactively suggest a check-in
CustomField.label: Last Assessment Date
